channel.title: GDACS RSS information
channel.description: Near real-time notification about natural disaster with a potential humanitarian impact

item.title: Green flood alert in Türkiye
item.description: On 28/06/2026, a flood started in Türkiye, lasting until 30/06/2026 (last update). The flood caused 0 deaths and 0 displaced .
item.dc:subject: FL1
item.gdacs:severity: Magnitude 0

gdacs:resource.gdacs:title: Event in rss format
gdacs:resource.gdacs:description: Joint Research Center of the European Commission
gdacs:resource.gdacs:acknowledgements: Copyright notice: European Union (CC BY 4.0), reuse is allowed, provided appropriate credit to GDACS is given.

item.title: Green earthquake (Magnitude 5.6M, Depth:35km) in Philippines 08/06/2026 09:17 UTC, 50 thousand in MMI IV.
item.description: On 6/8/2026 9:17:26 AM, an earthquake occurred in Philippines potentially affecting 50 thousand in MMI IV. The earthquake had Magnitude 5.6M, Depth:35km.
item.dc:subject: EQ1
item.gdacs:severity: Magnitude 5.6M, Depth:35km

item.title: Green notification for tropical cyclone BORIS-26. Population affected by Category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 0 (0.114 million in Tropical Storm).
item.description: From 07/06/2026 to 08/06/2026, a Tropical Storm (maximum wind speed of 65 km/h) BORIS-26 was active in Atlantic. The cyclone affects these countries: Mexico (vulnerability Medium). Estimated population affected by category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 0 (0.114 million in tropical storm).
item.dc:subject: TC1
item.gdacs:severity: Tropical Storm (maximum wind speed of 65 km/h)
item.gdacs:population: Population affected by Category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 0 (1.987 million in Tropical Storm)

item.title: Green notification for tropical cyclone AMANDA-26. Population affected by Category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 0 (0 in Tropical Storm).
item.description: From 02/06/2026 to 08/06/2026, a Tropical Depression (maximum wind speed of 74 km/h) AMANDA-26 was active in EastPacific. The cyclone affects these countries: [unknown] (vulnerability [unknown]). Estimated population affected by category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 0 (0 in tropical storm).
item.dc:subject: TC1
item.gdacs:severity: Tropical Depression (maximum wind speed of 46 km/h)
item.gdacs:population: Population affected by Category 1 (120 km/h) wind speeds or higher is 0 (0 in Tropical Storm)
